trade.summary: Moderate bilateral trade. Canada exports canola, wheat, lumber, and mining equipment to Malaysia. Malaysia exports electronics, palm oil, machinery, and chemicals to Canada. Malaysia is an important CPTPP partner.

diplomatic.summary: Constructive relations as Commonwealth partners and CPTPP members. Canada and Malaysia cooperate in APEC. Both have an interest in a stable Indo-Pacific. Canada is cautious about Malaysian human rights record.

military.summary: Modest military ties through Commonwealth frameworks. Canada has provided some training to Malaysian forces. Limited defense cooperation.

financial.summary: Limited bilateral investment. Canadian mining companies have some Malaysian market presence. Petronas has explored Canadian LNG opportunities. Growing interest in critical minerals.

energy.summary: Malaysia imports some Canadian LNG. Canada sees Malaysia as a potential buyer of Canadian energy exports. Petronas is active in Canadian LNG discussions.

scientific.summary: Limited but growing scientific cooperation. Some Malaysian students study in Canada. Joint research in tropical ecology and IT.
